title: paeonia clusii
intro: Paeonia clusii, also known as the Garden Peony, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Paeoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia clusii include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing skin irritations. Paeonia clusii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
